[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 110001010 4
1 010000010 2
2 010000001 2
3 010000001 2
4 010010000 2
5 000000000 a
6 010000000 1
7 100000010 2

01 10 100010000 2
12 21 000000100 1
23 32 010000000 1 match 6
34 43 110001010 4 match 0

56 65 010000001 2 match 2 3
67 76 010000001 2 match 2 3
70 07 010010000 2 match 4
